title: Purple Icons
body:
# Purple Icons!
I've made this as an add-on for my other resource pack: [Purple GUI](https://www.modrinth.com/resourcepack/purple-gui). But it does work without it too!

## Features
- Shaded icons for the hotbar. (I was inspired of [Enhanced Hud](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/enhanced-hud/) by [milesdemillas](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/milesdemillas/).
- Some pretty simple circles for the hunger bar.
- Both the XP bar and the bottle of enchanting are now purple, and also the bottle looks like a splash potion.
- Core shaders to change the color of the XP level text and the XP orbs. Made with [Custom XP Colours Generator](https://enchanted.games/generator/custom-xp-colours.html) by [Enchanted Games](https://www.modrinth.com/user/enchanted-games/).

## Preview
![Hotbar image with a preview of the health, absorption, armor and hunger icons, along with the XP bar. Also, featuring the hotbar slots of my other resource pack: Purple GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qW9uRaFO/images/b930af00d2c4c9c6a867314d900fe719d914c89c.png)

Hotbar image with a preview of the health, absorption, armor and hunger icons, along with the XP bar. Also, featuring the hotbar slots of my other resource pack: [Purple GUI](https://www.modrinth.com/resourcepack/purple-gui)

## Credits
- [Enchanted Games](https://modrinth.com/user/enchanted-games/)'s [Custom XP Colours Generator](https://enchanted.games/generator/custom-xp-colours.html).
- Huge inspiration in [Enhanced Hud](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/miles-enhanced-hud/) by [milesdemillas](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/milesdemillas/)
